homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 7 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: How correct is the information in the caption with relation to the audio? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, incorrect information) to 7 (best, accurate information)
prompts.1: Does this description contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (completely related)

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track features a lively and energetic mood driven by electric guitar, bass, and acoustic drums. The fast-paced rhythm creates a sense of urgency that makes the piece ideal for high-energy environments like dance parties or nightclubs.

prompts.0: How correct is the information in the caption with relation to the audio? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, incorrect information) to 7 (best, accurate information)
prompts.1: Does this description contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (completely related)

questions.name: Sample 3
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental composition features a slow, steady rhythm driven by a prominent string section, particularly violins, that creates a melancholic and dramatic atmosphere. The music maintains a somber and reflective mood throughout, with a strong bass line providing a solid foundation for moments of introspection.

prompts.0: How correct is the information in the caption with relation to the audio? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, incorrect information) to 7 (best, accurate information)
prompts.1: Does this description contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (completely related)

questions.name: Sample 4
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental composition blends game soundtrack elements with a fantasy-inspired atmosphere, featuring a steady and repetitive rhythm that maintains an engaging beat. The track harmoniously combines a melodic keyboard foundation with added depth from electric guitars and synthesizers to create a mysterious and adventurous mood. Its simple yet effective musical structure makes it well-suited for scenes involving exploration, discovery, or interactive digital worlds.

prompts.1: Does this description contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (completely related)

questions.name: Sample 5
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental nature sound track blends rhythmic guitar and bass with dynamic drums to create an immersive atmosphere. Ambient sounds of the natural world are woven throughout the composition, adding depth and a calming layer to the audio. The result is a soothing piece that effectively captures the serene feel of a recorded soundscape.

questions.name: Sample 6
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental Christmas Carol features a male vocalist performing over simple yet effective instrumentation at a steady, medium tempo. The arrangement creates a cheerful and festive atmosphere that feels perfect for a holiday movie or video game, despite the underlying slightly melancholic tone.

questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track creates a calm and introspective atmosphere that allows listeners to focus on the music's emotional depth. Driven primarily by guitar, the piece avoids vocals while establishing a meditative mood through its steady rhythm and melodic progression.

questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track features a blend of synth, bass, and electronic drums that create a slow, dark, and mysterious atmosphere. The ominous mood, reinforced by a haunting vocal sample, makes the piece well-suited for horror soundtracks or suspenseful video game moments.

questions.name: Sample 9
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This segment of Bach's *Johannes-Passion* features a powerful choral ensemble that delivers an epic and dramatic performance through strong harmonic dynamics. The slow, deliberate tempo builds significant tension and anticipation, creating a grand mood suitable for a climactic movie scene. Ultimately, the music combines emotional depth with a driving rhythm to produce a stirring auditory experience.

questions.name: Sample 10
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This comedic instrumental duet features a male lead singing the main melody while a female voice provides humorous backing vocals. The fast-paced rhythm is driven by a lively banjo and a strong bass line, creating a funny atmosphere perfect for a comedy skit. With its playful energy and clear holiday theme, the piece serves as an entertaining soundtrack suitable for a festive performance.

questions.caption: This instrumental track, titled "Noise Machines," blends experimental and electronic styles to create a dark, intense atmosphere suitable for retro video game action sequences. The composition relies heavily on synthesizers and digital noise to drive a fast-paced rhythm that evokes a strong sense of urgency.

questions.name: About You
questions.description: Please tell us about your musical background.

fields.label: How many years of musical experience do you have?
Please describe your musical experience (instruments played, training, listening habits, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g. I've played piano for 10 years and studied music theory in college...
